message:
refactor(ui): Extract time_parser module and add breadcrumbs component

Improve TUI code organization by extracting time parsing logic and
introducing a reusable breadcrumb navigation component.

Time Parser Module (src/ui/time_parser.rs):
- Extracted parse_time_input() from tui.rs into standalone module
- Comprehensive human-readable time input parsing supporting:
  - Relative: "-7d", "-24h", "-30m", "-1w" (days/hours/minutes/weeks)
  - Keywords: "now", "today", "yesterday"
  - ISO-8601: "2024-11-25", "2024-11-25T14:30:00Z"
  - Multiple date formats: YYYY-MM-DD, YYYY/MM/DD, MM/DD/YYYY
  - Unix timestamps: seconds (<10^11) or milliseconds
- All conversions output UTC milliseconds for consistent indexing

Breadcrumbs Component (src/ui/components/breadcrumbs.rs):
- New interactive breadcrumb bar showing current filter context
- Displays: Agent › Workspace › Date range › Ranking mode
- Each segment is a clickable region for filter clearing
- Adapts display based on active filters (shows "All agents" when unset)
- Uses theme palette for consistent styling
- Returns clickable regions for mouse interaction handling

TUI Refactoring (src/ui/tui.rs):
- Imports parse_time_input from new time_parser module
- Relocated format_time_short() and format_time_chip() for better cohesion
- Doc comment style standardization (/// instead of //!)
- Net reduction in tui.rs line count improves maintainability

Module Registration:
- Added time_parser to src/ui/mod.rs exports
- Added breadcrumbs to src/ui/components/mod.rs exports

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
